creator: nikita@druba.su
text:
Hi to all! 
When I try to build sysutils/polkit-qt5, I see the next messages:
/usr/ports/sysutils/polkit-qt5 # make extract
===>  License LGPL21 accepted by the user
===>   polkit-qt4-0.112.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by polkit-qt4-0.112.0_1 for building
===>  Extracting for polkit-qt4-0.112.0_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for polkit-qt-1-0.112.0.tar.bz2.

The same story with devel/qca-qt5:
/usr/ports/devel/qca-qt5 # make extract
===>   qca-qt4-2.1.3_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by qca-qt4-2.1.3_1 for building
===>  Extracting for qca-qt4-2.1.3_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for qca-2.1.3.tar.xz.

But, when I try to install them from pkg, both packages successfully installs. This looks, like wrong download link in ports tree(qt4 instead qt5). Can somebody fix this?
Thanx in advance.
